text.title: IP-Sensitive Workflow Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid IP-Sensitive Workflow Design output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: verbatim or paraphrased clause with citation

forbidden.pattern: shared accounts/devices between employer and side
side-work commits during employer hours per calendar
ip_attribution_log absent AND IP clause is restrictive

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: employer_ip_clause_summary populated with a typed value
repo_separation populated with a typed value
time_fencing populated with a typed value
ip_attribution_log_path populated with a typed value
disclosure_status populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
